anti_claim: Batch 11 validates source-open or source-faithful public ports for run affinity, calculator insight derivation, std_python ratchet gating, exogenous navigation grading, portability supersession, shard browse sectioning, research evidence selection, projection secret scanning, quant presentation mart normalization, macro-regime bucketing, frontend wayfinding, session diagnostics, and demo-take coverage scoring. It is not live Work Ledger truth, not navigation authority, not complete secret detection, not live market data, not investment advice, not raw transcript authority, not video capture, not publication authority, and not release approval.

allowed_public_inputs: public mechanism ids and source-module ids
public negative-case ids and stable error codes
exact copied non-secret macro source modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
bounded synthetic exercise inputs and outcomes
binding dispositions, authority ceilings, and anti-claims
public negative-case probe inputs used by the integrity matrix
forbidden_public_inputs: live Work Ledger state as authority
investment advice or live market advice

source_refs.role: public mechanism and negative-case fixture source

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Fixture-only claims, live authority, source mutation, publication or release signaling, complete secret detection, private-root equivalence, or investment advice.
failure_modes: mechanism count drifts from the thirteen Batch-11 target rows without updating fixture, receipts, and docs
source module count drifts from twelve without manifest and test updates
copied source module digest does not match macro source digest
copied source module lacks required anchors
negative-case fixtures become verdict authority instead of labels paired to computed mechanism outcomes
negative-case fixtures carry only stable codes without public probe inputs and computed fixture-probe digests
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, provider/browser state, credentials, live ledger state, private paths, or publication/release state
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe composite organ that imports or binds Batch-11 saturation-layer engines across run selection, calculators, standards ratchets, navigation grading, portability, shard browsing, research evidence, projection scanning, quant marts, session diagnostics, and demo-take coverage.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun representative Batch-11 macro mechanisms without inheriting live ledger, navigation, release, publication, provider, browser, market, or private authority.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly thirteen Batch-11 mechanism rows
require exactly thirteen passed mechanism exercises
require exactly twelve copied macro source modules
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for every copied source module
require an integrity-matrix row for every mechanism with source refs, binding disposition, claim ceiling, and computed positive/negative behavior
require stable negative-case codes and public probe inputs for all thirteen negative cases while treating fixture files as labels, not verdict authority
require every integrity-matrix negative case to include a fixture_probe_input_digest, fixture_probe_source, fixture_computed_value, and mechanism_computed_value
keep provider dispatch, live Work Ledger authority, source mutation, publication, release, market advice, complete secret detection, and whole-system correctness authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 11 saturation engines capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 11 saturation engines capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch11_saturation_engines_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: Batch 11 validates source-open or source-faithful public ports for run affinity, calculator insight derivation, std_python ratchet gating, exogenous navigation grading, portability supersession, shard browse sectioning, research evidence selection, projection secret scanning, quant presentation mart normalization, macro-regime bucketing, frontend wayfinding, session diagnostics, and demo-take coverage scoring. It is not live Work Ledger truth, not navigation authority, not complete secret detection, not live market data, not investment advice, not raw transcript authority, not video capture, not publication authority, and not release approval.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, product-readiness, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry-backed source standard already carried accepted, active, source-body-import, or body-floor status; this update narrows it into the active v2 JSON contract shape without raising its authority ceiling.
